source.buildspec:
version: 0.2

env:
  variables:
    CUSTOMER_APP_DIR: "MobilityAIapp/android/customer"
    S3_APK_BUCKET: "opusaimobility-apk-distribution"
  secrets-manager:
    KEYSTORE_PASSWORD: "opusaimobility/android-keystore:storePassword"
    KEY_ALIAS: "opusaimobility/android-keystore:keyAlias"
    KEY_PASSWORD: "opusaimobility/android-keystore:keyPassword"
    GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY: "terraai/google-maps:GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY"

phases:
  install:
    runtime-versions:
      java: corretto17
      nodejs: 22
    commands:
      - echo "=== Install Phase ==="
      - java -version
      - |
        if [ -n "$ANDROID_HOME" ] && [ -d "$ANDROID_HOME" ]; then SDK="$ANDROID_HOME"; elif [ -d "/usr/local/android-sdk" ]; then SDK="/usr/local/android-sdk"; elif [ -d "$HOME/android-sdk" ]; then SDK="$HOME/android-sdk"; else mkdir -p $HOME/android-sdk/cmdline-tools && cd /tmp && wget -q https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-11076708_latest.zip -O clt.zip && unzip -q clt.zip -d /tmp/clt_extract && mv /tmp/clt_extract/cmdline-tools $HOME/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/latest && SDK="$HOME/android-sdk" && export PATH="$PATH:$SDK/cmdline-tools/latest/bin" && cd "$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR" && yes | sdkmanager --licenses > /dev/null 2>&1 || true && sdkmanager "platforms;android-34" "build-tools;34.0.0" "platform-tools" 2>&1 | tail -3 || true; fi && echo "$SDK" > /tmp/android-sdk-path.txt && echo "sdk.dir=$SDK" > "$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR/$CUSTOMER_APP_DIR/local.properties" && echo "ANDROID_HOME=$SDK"
      - echo "=== FIX duplicate google_map_key ==="
      - STRINGS_FILE="$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR/$CUSTOMER_APP_DIR/app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml"
      - grep -n 'google_map_key' "$STRINGS_FILE" || echo "No google_map_key found"
      - sed -i '/<string name="google_map_key"/d' "$STRINGS_FILE" && echo "Removed static google_map_key declaration" || echo "sed failed"
      - grep 'google_map_key' "$STRINGS_FILE" && echo "WARNING still present" || echo "CLEAN: google_map_key removed OK"
      - echo "=== Decode keystore ==="
      - aws secretsmanager get-secret-value --secret-id "opusaimobility/android-keystore" --query "SecretString" --output text --region us-east-1 > /tmp/ks-secret.json
      - node -e "var s=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/tmp/ks-secret.json','utf8'));var d=process.env.CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR+'/'+process.env.CUSTOMER_APP_DIR+'/app/terraai-release.jks';require('fs').writeFileSync(d,Buffer.from(s.keystoreBase64,'base64'));console.log('KS bytes:',Buffer.from(s.keystoreBase64,'base64').length);"
      - rm -f /tmp/ks-secret.json
      - echo "=== Patch google-services.json ==="
      - node -e "var fs=require('fs');var p=process.env.CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR+'/'+process.env.CUSTOMER_APP_DIR+'/app/google-services.json';try{var g=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));var k=process.env.GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY||'';if(g.client&&g.client[0]&&g.client[0].api_key){g.client[0].api_key[0].current_key=k;fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(g,null,2));console.log('Maps key patched');}}catch(e){console.warn('skip:',e.message);}"
      - chmod +x "$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR/$CUSTOMER_APP_DIR/gradlew"
      - echo "Install done"

  build:
    commands:
      - echo "=== Build Phase ==="
      - SDK=$(cat /tmp/android-sdk-path.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "$HOME/android-sdk")
      - export ANDROID_HOME="$SDK" ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="$SDK" GRADLE_USER_HOME="$HOME/.gradle"
      - cd "$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR/$CUSTOMER_APP_DIR" && echo "sdk.dir=$ANDROID_HOME" > local.properties
      - sed -i '/<string name="google_map_key"/d' "app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml" 2>/dev/null && echo "BUILD-safe: removed google_map_key" || echo "BUILD-safe: not found"
      - export KEYSTORE_FILE="$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR/$CUSTOMER_APP_DIR/app/terraai-release.jks"
      - echo "Building debug APK..."
      - cd "$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR/$CUSTOMER_APP_DIR" && ./gradlew assembleDebug "-PGOOGLE_MAPS_KEY=${GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY:-}" --no-daemon --no-build-cache --rerun-tasks --stacktrace 2>&1
      - find "$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR/$CUSTOMER_APP_DIR/app/build/outputs" -name "*.apk" 2>/dev/null || echo "No APKs"
      - |
        if [ -f "$KEYSTORE_FILE" ] && [ -n "$KEYSTORE_PASSWORD" ]; then
          cd "$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR/$CUSTOMER_APP_DIR" && ./gradlew assembleRelease "-PGOOGLE_MAPS_KEY=${GOOGLE_MAPS_KEY:-}" --no-daemon --no-build-cache --rerun-tasks --stacktrace 2>&1 || echo "Release failed"
        else
          echo "No keystore - skip release"
        fi

  post_build:
    commands:
      - echo "=== Post-Build ==="
      - BUILD_TS=$(date -u +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
      - COMMIT_SHORT=$(echo $CODEBUILD_RESOLVED_SOURCE_VERSION | cut -c1-8)
      - DEBUG_APK="$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR/$CUSTOMER_APP_DIR/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk"
      - |
        if [ -f "$DEBUG_APK" ]; then
          aws s3 cp "$DEBUG_APK" "s3://$S3_APK_BUCKET/customer/debug/aimobility-customer-debug-${BUILD_TS}-${COMMIT_SHORT}.apk" --region us-east-1
          aws s3 cp "$DEBUG_APK" "s3://$S3_APK_BUCKET/customer/debug/aimobility-customer-debug-latest.apk" --region us-east-1
          echo "APK_UPLOADED"
        else
          echo "APK NOT FOUND" && exit 1
        fi
      - RELEASE_APK="$CODEBUILD_SRC_DIR/$CUSTOMER_APP_DIR/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk"
      - |
        if [ -f "$RELEASE_APK" ]; then
          aws s3 cp "$RELEASE_APK" "s3://$S3_APK_BUCKET/customer/release/aimobility-customer-${BUILD_TS}-${COMMIT_SHORT}.apk" --region us-east-1
          aws s3 cp "$RELEASE_APK" "s3://$S3_APK_BUCKET/customer/release/aimobility-customer-latest.apk" --region us-east-1
          echo "RELEASE_UPLOADED"
        fi
      - echo "Customer build complete - $BUILD_TS"

artifacts:
  files:
    - "**/*.apk"
  base-directory: "MobilityAIapp/android/customer/app/build/outputs"
  discard-paths: no
  name: customer-apk-artifacts

cache:
  paths:
    - /root/.gradle/wrapper/**/*
    - /root/.gradle/caches/**/*
    - MobilityAIapp/android/customer/.gradle/**/*
